title: #DecodingthePolls Ep.45 | Narratives, Numbers & Power: Decoding Tamil Nadu and West Bengal | CPPR
description: Introduction The upcoming state elections in Tamil Nadu and West Bengal in 2026 present two distinct yet deeply consequential political contests that reflect broader shifts in India’s electoral landscape.
